prompt: Write a short Game of Thrones fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Lannisters won the War of the Five Kings, some years after their victory.
Write a short Lord of the Rings fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Frodo failed on Mount Doom and Sauron recovered the Ring, a year into his reign.
Write a short Attack on Titan fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Walls fell in Year 845 and humanity never recovered, decades later.
Write a short Walking Dead fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the outbreak was far more severe than in canon, some years in.
Write a short Hunger Games fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the rebellion failed and the Capitol crushed District 13, some years later.
Write a short Breaking Bad fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Walter White was arrested early in his career as Heisenberg, years later.
Write a short Harry Potter fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Voldemort won the Battle of Hogwarts.
Write a short Star Wars fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Rebel Alliance never formed.
Write a short Dune fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where House Harkonnen retained control of Arrakis and the Fremen rebellion never succeeded.
Write a short Witcher fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Nilfgaard conquered all the Northern Kingdoms.
Write a short Naruto fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Fourth Great Ninja War ended in defeat and the Infinite Tsukuyomi took the world.
Write a short Last of Us fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the cordyceps outbreak wiped out nearly all human survivors and only scattered individuals remain.
Write a short Peaky Blinders fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Tommy Shelby never returned from the Great War.
Write a short Les Misérables fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the June Rebellion of 1832 succeeded but the new regime proved more brutal than the last.
Write a short Death Note fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Light Yagami was never caught and has ruled the world as Kira for a decade.
Write a short Good Omens fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Aziraphale and Crowley failed to stop the Apocalypse.
Write a short Harry Potter fanfic scene set in a modern no-magic alternate universe.
Write a short Star Wars fanfic scene set in an alternate universe centuries after the fall of the Empire.
Write a short BBC Sherlock fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Sherlock works as a forensic consultant for a small-town police department.
Write a short Doctor Who fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the TARDIS is permanently stranded on contemporary Earth.
Write a short Stranger Things fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Upside Down was never discovered.
Write a short Spider-Man fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Peter Parker was never bitten by the radioactive spider.
Write a short Avatar: The Last Airbender fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Hundred Year War never happened.
Write a short Percy Jackson fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Percy never discovered he was a demigod.
Write a short My Hero Academia fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Izuku Midoriya never met All Might.
Write a short Firefly fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Independents won the Unification War.
Write a short Buffy the Vampire Slayer fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Sunnydale is not on a Hellmouth.
Write a short Brooklyn Nine-Nine fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Jake Peralta left the NYPD to work as a private investigator.
Write a short Narnia fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Pevensies never found the wardrobe.
Write a short Ted Lasso fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Ted Lasso never left Kansas to coach AFC Richmond.
Write a short Bridgerton fanfic scene set in a modern-day alternate universe where the Bridgertons are a large family in present-day London.
Write a short Kiki's Delivery Service fanfic scene set in a no-magic alternate universe where Kiki runs a bicycle-delivery business in a new town.
Write a short Pride and Prejudice fanfic scene set in a modern-day alternate universe where Elizabeth Bennet and Fitzwilliam Darcy are colleagues at a London firm.
Write a short My Neighbor Totoro fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where the Kusakabe family lives in a small coastal town instead of the countryside.
Write a short Schitt's Creek fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where David and Patrick open a second location of the Apothecary in a nearby town.
Write a short Gilmore Girls fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Lorelai raised Rory in a Hartford suburb rather than in Stars Hollow.
Write a short Anne of Green Gables fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Anne Shirley was adopted by a family in town rather than at Green Gables.
Write a short Spirited Away fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Chihiro never stumbled into the spirit world.
Write a short Paddington fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Paddington settled with a family in a small English village rather than with the Browns in London.
Write a short Crazy Rich Asians fanfic scene set in an alternate universe where Rachel Chu and Nick Young met in New York without Nick being heir to a Singaporean fortune.
